author: cms-tsg-storm
body:
backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51247

#### PR description:

Development of HLT menus for `CMSSW_16_1_X`:
   * This is the PR for the `16_1_X branch` (this is the release cycle currently used for Run-3 HLT-menu development).
   
These updates correspond to the updates accumulated after the delivery second version "V1.1" of the HIon menu for the 2026 PbPb data-taking.
This update includes the integration of the following JIRA tickets:
- [CMSHLT-3862](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3852) [HIN,TRK] Fixes needed on top of `HIon` V1.1
- [CMSHLT-3863](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3853) [HIN,TRK] Add `hltSiPixelClustersPPOnAA` to the `HIHLTMonitor` event content
- [CMSHLT-3867](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3867) [HIN] Removal of HI electron and "backup" trigger paths for 161X   

In addition this PR introduces the following commits:
- 5ac652ba29adfeef2af7c1022437b291d6cd80c8 : update hltPathOwners.json for after HLT `HIon` V1.1

#### PR validation:

TSG Integration tests

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51247 to the current TSG production cycle (`CMSSW_16_1_X`)
title: HLT menu development for `16_1_X` (3/N)
